title: Better Glider Crafting
description: You need WHAT to craft reinforced paper?
body:
**Requires [Gliders by Jeryn (duh)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gliders) to work properly**. \
_It's also compatible (and in fact first intended to be used) with [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)_

If you're like me then you may have thought "wow, gliders are so cool, i wish minecraft had em". then you might've stumbled upon Gliders; great animations, models & spritework, cool features like hot air lifting upwards & so much care behind the project.

You download it, check what is it you need to get your first glider ASAP, and you're greeted to the sight of **15 leather and 12 paper** just to get your basic glider going. Fine. you collect the materials, fly around for some time and it **breaks???** yeah no, that's too much.

This datapack simply adds a much cheaper way to craft your average glider, hope you enjoy!

**This is a personal datapack that I'm looking to share. It's not meant to attack the original mod developers, just to adjust the balancing to my own liking**
